description: ARM Cortex-M4 32b MCU+FPU, 210DMIPS, up to 1MB Flash/192+4KB RAM, USB OTG HS/FS, Ethernet, 17 TIMs, 3 ADCs, 15 comm. interfaces & camera

VIN.parameter: Input voltage on five-volt tolerant pin

VIN_VSS_0_3_to_4_0.parameter: Input voltage on any other pin

|ΔVDDx|.parameter: Variations between different VDD power pins

|VSSX - VSS|.parameter: Variations between all the different ground pins

IVDD.parameter: Total current into VDD power lines (source)

IVSS.parameter: Total current out of VSS ground lines (sink)

IIO.parameter: Output current source by any I/Os and control pin

IINJ(PIN).parameter: Injected current on any other pin

ΣIINJ(PIN).parameter: Total injected current (sum of all I/O and control pins)

IDD.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (ART ON, 168MHz)
IDD.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, fHCLK=168MHz

IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (ART ON, 168MHz, 25C)
IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, fHCLK=168MHz

RPU.conditions: VIN = VSS, all pins except PA10, PB12

RPD.conditions: VIN = VDD, all pins except PA10, PB12
